package rulefixtures

import (
	"bytes"
)

// scenario for bytes_toupper_equalfold: `bytes.Equal(bytes.ToUpper(...), bytes.ToUpper(...))` instead of `bytes.EqualFold(...)`.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario467Negative(haystack []byte, needle []byte, left []byte, right []byte) bool {
	return bytes.EqualFold(left, right)
}
